0.text: Centrilobular emphysema more prominent in the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Areas of linear atelectasis in both lungs

2.text: Several nodules in both lungs, some calcified, largest 3 mm in diameter in the medial segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Two fusiform-shaped nodules in both lungs, largest 4.5 mm in diameter, superposed on the right major fissure, possibly intrapulmonary lymph nodes
